title: Divinn's Cobblemon & Stuff
description: Inspired by the Actions & Stuff Bedrock Addon, an enhanced, unique Vanilla+ experience with Cobblemon.
body:
![Divinn's Cobblemon & Stuff Banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/77b8f9cbb425ee0637f1e547e7e0602811b494b1.png)

# The Ultimate Unique Vanilla+ experience

**Cobblemon & Stuff takes inspiration from the Actions & Stuff Bedrock addon and adds Cobblemon, animations, more vanilla type content and a smoother vanilla experience without going overboard all on Java Edition**

My goal with this modpack was to make a Minecraft 2 with Cobblemon without going too much on the Vanilla experience. While some mods are very popular, others aren't and I hope give a unique experience while still being quality.
# 
# Features

### **Cobblemon**
The new 1.7 Cobblemon update brings riding your Pokemon with quality animations. There are also several addons to enhance the Cobblemon experience.

### **Hold My Items + Fresh Animations**
Along with other texutre packs this brings those satisfying animations inspired from the Actions & Stuff Bedrock Addon

### **The Aether and other Dimensions**
Explore brand new dimensions and visit overhauled Vanilla dimensions

### **Structure Mods**
Explore a huge variety of new structures from big to small containing loot within all of the modpack's dimensions

### **Immersive Interfaces + Unique Dark** 
Overhauled UI bringing a more satisfying experience to basic tasks

### And Much More!

# Thank you & More
If you haven't already please check out my **Tik Tok to see more of the Modpack's Content**.
Thank you for all of those who have shown support for the modpack through my Tik Toks I seriously appreciate it.

# Issues
If you encounter any issues at all or have any feedback for the modpack, or just want to talk about the modpack, please join the Discord linked on this page. The more feedback the better.
